title: Four Sleeps in Tensleep
summary:
I have taken a few climbing trips to Ten Sleep over the last few years and loved it. Helen had never been before so I was excited to share one of my favorite places with her. We found a very nice camp spot in a grassy meadow only a few minutes drive to the climbing. We spent four nights in the canyon, splitting our time between climbing, relaxing, running and cooking. I got in at least 5 or 6 pitches of climbing each day and managed to climb my hardest route in the last two years, which got me very excited! We have also been following the World Cup, and spent a few afternoons watching games.

-Colin

photos.caption: Maya basking in the dandelion flowers at our campsite.
A close up of some of the flowers on the approach trail.
One of the many limestone walls in Tensleep Canyon.
A swallowtail butterfly that joined us at camp.
